name: Suspicious Number of Same User Logins to Multiple Devices
notes:
This rule triggers when the same user attempts to login to multiple devices in a short duration.

Note: Tune the rule accordingly to your compliance requirement.
conditions_text: when the event category for the event is one of the following Authentication.User Login Success, Authentication.User Login Attempt, Authentication.Admin Login Attempt, Authentication.Admin Login Successful
when at least 10 events are seen with the same Username and different Log Source in 5 minutes
thresholds: when at least 10 events are seen with the same Username and different Log Source in 5 minutes
TD_list: APPLY Suspicious Number of Same User Logins to Multiple Devices on events which are detected by the LOCAL system

AND when the event category for the event is one of the following Authentication.User Login Success, Authentication.User Login Attempt, Authentication.Admin Login Attempt, Authentication.Admin Login Successful
AND when at least 10 events are seen with the same Username and different Log Source in 5 minutes
RED_list: Event name: Suspicious Number of Same User Logins to Multiple Devices
Event description: Detects when the same user attempts to login to multiple devices in a short duration of time.
Force the dispatched event to create a NEW offense, select the offense using Username
This information should contribute to the name of the associated offense(s)
